svg.font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
svg.title: ~/myapp — claude code + unison
svg.desc: With Unison: apilookup fetches current Anthropic docs in a sub-process (zero token cost in the main context) and returns the accurate shape — cache_control attaches to content blocks, with both ephemeral and persistent TTLs, supported on tool definitions and results.
svg.text: configure prompt caching with the anthropic sdk
cache_control attaches to content blocks, supports
model: claude-opus-4-7 · current as of today
